name: Mongodb
philosophy: MongoDB carries a strong dual-mode visual identity — dark deep-teal hero bands with bright MongoDB green ({colors.brand-green}) CTAs paired with stark white documentation surfaces.
trademark_signals: Deep navy/teal hero bands  with bright MongoDB green  CTA pills
Stark white pricing/documentation surfaces with colored category tags for course tiles (purple, orange, green, teal)
Euclid Circular A across every UI surface
3-tier pricing comparison (Free / Flex / Dedicated) with featured-mint highlight tier
ai_slop_avoided: use the bright green for body text or large surfaces
introduce additional accent colors beyond the brand green and category-encoding palette
soften corners on buttons; the pill is a brand signature
